name: Broadway Driving Range & Miniature Golf
about: Broadway Driving Range & Miniature Golf offers a comprehensive golf experience with both outdoor and indoor facilities. The venue features a 350+ yard driving range with covered and natural turf tees, an 18-hole miniature golf course, and an indoor golf simulator facility. The property is themed around a 1930s barn, providing a rustic atmosphere. The indoor golf simulator uses Foresight Sports Falcon technology and is available year-round by reservation. The venue also includes a pro shop selling golf equipment and pickleball accessories, and offers event hosting for various occasions.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight Sports Falcon simulator technology with accurate ball and club tracking
Year-round indoor access with reservation-only bookings ensuring availability
Supports both left and right-handed players with a massive ball-capture range
Variety of booking options from 1 to 4 hours to accommodate different group sizes
Beautifully landscaped 18-hole miniature golf course with ponds, streams, and waterfalls

food_and_drink.notes: Snack shop with a variety of cold beverages and snacks available in the pro shop
No mention of alcohol service or bar on the website

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end simulator with massive ball-capture range for accurate tracking of all clubs from driver to putter

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The pro shop offers new and used golf clubs for purchase or rental. You can bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack shop with cold beverages and snacks available for purchase. BYOB is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, it takes one hour per golfer to play 18 holes on the miniature golf course.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the miniature golf course is fun and challenging for all ages, with 10 of 18 holes being wheelchair accessible.
